name: Amazon Web Services, Inc.
lede: AWS runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Hyderabad and Mumbai, covering it, built over ten years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AWS office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AWS GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AWS runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Mumbai), covering it. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: AWS's India footprint covers Hyderabad and Mumbai, spanning it. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Cloud Application Services Platform, Cloud Technology Software

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seven decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does AWS operate in India?
faq.a: AWS operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AWS have GCC centers in?
faq.a: AWS's India GCC footprint spans Hyderabad and Mumbai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does AWS run in India?
faq.a: AWS runs it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AWS's India GCCs?
faq.a: AWS's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AWS's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 7 leaders at AWS's India centers, across IT and HR. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
